form.formComment: After failing to finish two starts back he came out and won easily by 6 lengths at this track (22.83) beating Starlight Duke in a Grade 5 on April 4. Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: After failing to finish two starts back he came out and won easily by 6 lengths at this track (22.83) beating Starlight Duke in a Grade 5 on April 4. Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened, checked and fell through the 1st turn.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance to score by 4.5 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording an enormous 22.76 over the 400m journey. Can measure up again if runs up to that effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Eye-catching performance to score by 4.5 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording an enormous 22.76 over the 400m journey. Can measure up again if runs up to that effort.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped on rounding the first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Most recently finished last on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Hi Lo Rain beaten 19 lengths (24.29) in a Grade 5. Racing well and has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Most recently finished last on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Hi Lo Rain beaten 19 lengths (24.29) in a Grade 5. Racing well and has to be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the first turn tightened for room and lost ground momentarily.

form.formComment: Didn't complete the course last start. Reasonable effort the start before when second over 300m at Taree Super Track. Others preferred on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't complete the course last start. Reasonable effort the start before when second over 300m at Taree Super Track. Others preferred on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 400m at this track behind My Wee Lass beaten 4.5 lengths (23.13). Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 400m at this track behind My Wee Lass beaten 4.5 lengths (23.13). Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh on April 4 over 400m at this track behind Kalani Sea, beaten 9 lengths (23.79) in a Grade 5. Prefer in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished seventh on April 4 over 400m at this track behind Kalani Sea, beaten 9 lengths (23.79) in a Grade 5. Prefer in something easier.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Latest effort finished last over 515m at this track beaten 6 lengths (30.57) behind Homer Mulwee in a Grade 5 on April 10. Well placed and among the chances here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Goes well at this track and trip. Latest effort finished last over 515m at this track beaten 6 lengths (30.57) behind Homer Mulwee in a Grade 5 on April 10. Well placed and among the chances here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out shortly after the start and was bumped on the hindquarters.

form.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when second (23.33) over 400m at this track. Jumps from the outside. One of the better hopes.
